form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up finished fourth of 12 starters at Fairyhouse on February 3 over 3218m, on heavy track; 20 len behind Our Uncle Jack with 71kg at $2.90. Second-up finished second of 10 starters at Downpatrick on March 29 over 3621m, 2.75 len behind Lips Freedom with 71kg at $2.80. Racing well. Rates highly in this field and should play a major role.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Second run from a spell finished seventh of 10 runners at Dundalk All Weather on March 27 over 3218m, 9 len behind Desert Friend with 61.5kg at $23. Rates well. Needs to find more to figure.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last start finished sixth of 14 starters at Downpatrick on March 29 over 4425m, 12 len behind Cozone with 71kg at $23. form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after four months finished sixth of 14 starters at Wexford on March 17 over 3218m, slow track; 29 len behind Zam Bobbler with 71kg at $26. Previously second-up finished sixth of 12 runners at Navan on November 16 over 3218m, on a wet track; 17 len behind Barbizon with 70kg at $201. Better placed here and expecting an improved run.
